title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Berger Silk Store

jsonLd.title: Entry-Level Visual Merchandiser at Berger Silk Store
jsonLd.description:
We at Berger Silk Store are looking for an experienced Visual Merchandiser based out of Pimpri-Chinchwad. If you are a result-oriented professional with a passion for excellence, we want to hear from you.

About Berger Silk Store:
Berger Silk Store is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Train and motivate the sales team to deliver excellent service
• Implement promotional activities and in-store campaigns
• Handle customer queries, complaints, and escalations effectively
• Achieve sales targets and improve store performance metrics
• Maintain high standards of store hygiene and cleanliness
• Monitor inventory levels and coordinate replenishment activities
• Build relationships with regular customers to drive loyalty

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• MBBS / MD / MS from recognized medical college
• 12-20 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in Customer Service
• Proficiency in Supply Chain
• Proficiency in CRM
• Proficiency in Retail Operations
• Proficiency in Retail Analytics
• Proficiency in E-commerce Integration
• Proficiency in Team Leadership

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Competitive salary with performance-linked incentives
• Comprehensive health insurance for self and family
• Flexible working hours
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Life and accident insurance
• Learning & development budget
• Salary Range: 35 LPA - 70 LPA per annum

Location: Pimpri-Chinchwad, Maharashtra, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Berger Silk Store!
